case_title: CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. CHUNG HO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,532.75 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSEBEL SINGH--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE SERVED OCT-03-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-08-2025 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.50 - SERVED AUG-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, CHUNG $5,065.50 PRINCIPAL, $2,532.75 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,598.25
